'''parocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycoreovirus|mycoreovirus]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-r-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycoreovirus|mycoreovirus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| parocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pærecheth|pærecheth]] || [[word:pærechej|pærechej]] || [[word:pærechesh|pærechesh]] || [[word:pæreche|pæreche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:parorochoth|parorochoth]] || [[word:parorochoj|parorochoj]] || [[word:parorochosh|parorochosh]] || [[word:parorocho|parorocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:parochoth|parochoth]] || [[word:parochoj|parochoj]] || [[word:parochosh|parochosh]] || [[word:parocho|parocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:parofchoth|parofchoth]] || [[word:parofchoj|parofchoj]] || [[word:parofchosh|parofchosh]] || [[word:parofchof|parofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:parochotho|parochotho]] || [[word:parochojo|parochojo]] || [[word:parochosho|parochosho]] || [[word:parochoko|parochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:parochoth|parochoth]] || [[word:parochoj|parochoj]] || [[word:parochosh|parochosh]] || [[word:parocho|parocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:parochothol|parochothol]] || [[word:parochojol|parochojol]] || [[word:parochoshol|parochoshol]] || [[word:parochokol|parochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:parochothotho|parochothotho]] || [[word:parochojojo|parochojojo]] || [[word:parochoshosho|parochoshosho]] || [[word:parochoko|parochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:parochothon|parochothon]] || [[word:parochojon|parochojon]] || [[word:parochoshon|parochoshon]] || [[word:parochokon|parochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:parochothoro|parochothoro]] || [[word:parochojoro|parochojoro]] || [[word:parochoshoro|parochoshoro]] || [[word:parochokoro|parochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
